assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section renders the touch-point section with threshold selector and disclaimer
assertionResults.title: renders the touch-point section with threshold selector and disclaimer

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section touch-point subfilters are hidden by default (threshold OFF)
assertionResults.title: touch-point subfilters are hidden by default (threshold OFF)

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section "выкл" pill is visible and aria-pressed by default
assertionResults.title: "выкл" pill is visible and aria-pressed by default

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section selecting a threshold reveals the subfilter block
assertionResults.title: selecting a threshold reveals the subfilter block

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section clicking "выкл" clears every touch-point subfilter value
assertionResults.title: clicking "выкл" clears every touch-point subfilter value

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section switching between numeric thresholds preserves subfilter values
assertionResults.title: switching between numeric thresholds preserves subfilter values

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section hasCrossing toggle reflects the current filter value
assertionResults.title: hasCrossing toggle reflects the current filter value

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section hasCrossing toggle flips between OFF and ON on click
assertionResults.title: hasCrossing toggle flips between OFF and ON on click

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section selecting a threshold from OFF auto-activates hasCrossing
assertionResults.title: selecting a threshold from OFF auto-activates hasCrossing

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section changing threshold-to-threshold preserves hasCrossing state
assertionResults.title: changing threshold-to-threshold preserves hasCrossing state

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section crossing-time range inputs propagate into FilterState
assertionResults.title: crossing-time range inputs propagate into FilterState

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section viscosity threshold presets propagate into FilterState
assertionResults.title: viscosity threshold presets propagate into FilterState

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section viscosity threshold custom input propagates into FilterState on blur
assertionResults.title: viscosity threshold custom input propagates into FilterState on blur

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section hasCrossing toggle label reflects the active threshold
assertionResults.title: hasCrossing toggle label reflects the active threshold

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section viscosity-at-target range inputs propagate into FilterState
assertionResults.title: viscosity-at-target range inputs propagate into FilterState

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section "Clear All" resets every touch-point field to its empty value
assertionResults.title: "Clear All" resets every touch-point field to its empty value

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section "Clear All" is disabled when no touch-point filter is active and no other filters are set
assertionResults.title: "Clear All" is disabled when no touch-point filter is active and no other filters are set

assertionResults.fullName: ExperimentFilters — touch-point section "Clear All" is enabled as soon as any touch-point filter becomes active
assertionResults.title: "Clear All" is enabled as soon as any touch-point filter becomes active
